slash.name: Slash
slash.description: Deals moderate physical damage. Scales with Attack and is reduced by target's Defense.

shield_up.name: Shield Up
shield_up.description: Raises the user's Defense by 5 for two turns.

battle_cry.name: Battle Cry
battle_cry.description: Raises the user's Attack by 5 for two turns.

second_wind.name: Second Wind
second_wind.description: Heals the user for 20 base HP. Scales with Magic.

shadow_bolt.name: Shadow Bolt
shadow_bolt.description: Deals heavy magic damage. Scales with Magic and bypasses Defense entirely.

drain_life.name: Drain Life
drain_life.description: Deals light magic damage and heals the user for the same amount. Scales with Magic.

curse.name: Curse
curse.description: Lowers the target's Attack by 5 for two turns.

dark_pact.name: Dark Pact
dark_pact.description: Raises the user's Magic by 5 for two turns at the cost of 15 HP.

bite.name: Bite
bite.description: Deals moderate physical damage. Scales with Attack and is reduced by Defense.

web_throw.name: Web Throw
web_throw.description: Deals light physical damage and lowers the target's Defense by 5 for two turns. Scales with Attack.
